programme.title: Sofa Silahlane
programme.desc: When a young man's pregnant girlfriend loses her life in a tragic accident he struggles to accept that his one true love is no more.

programme.title: Usathane Akanaqiniso
programme.desc: A doctor's failing marriage pushes him into an affair, but the woman is not who he thinks she is. Is it too late to save his marriage?

programme.title: Molamu
programme.desc: Stunned by the loss of his father and humiliated by his peers, a boy's journey to manhood is ignited by the power of friendship and the art of stick fighting.

programme.title: Izinkomo
programme.desc: A young man takes it upon himself to hunt down the thieves who have stolen cows from his family's farm and community.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Supermama
programme.desc: Desmond Dube and Nomsa Buthelezi star in this hilarious family film. After meeting a mysterious Kung Fu master, Doris becomes a crime fighter.

programme.title: Ifour Room
programme.desc: A fragile widower becomes the target of two scheming women who are determined to take over the house left by her husband.

programme.title: Call Centre
programme.desc: A young heiress inherits her late father's call centre and has to recruit and manage a staff of odd-ball characters, with hilarious results.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Taron Egerton and Jamie Foxx turn the age-old tale on its head in this movie. A war-hardened Crusader and his Moorish commander lead a revolt against the corrupt English crown.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: Gerard Butler and Morena Baccarin drive this chaos-filled film. As comet fragments hit the earth, a family scrambles to safety while the world around them turns into chaos.

programme.title: Twisted Twin
programme.desc: A captivating thriller. When a college student reunites with her long-lost twin sister, she soon learns that she has a dark plan to steal her identity and frame her for murder.

programme.title: I Am Mortal
programme.desc: A gripping sci-fi set 200 years in the future when humanity has achieved immortality. But a small band of rebels seeks to overthrow the status quo and reclaim their right to die.

programme.title: I Can Only Imagine
programme.desc: An inspiring true story about music, dreams, redemption and forgiveness. Follow MercyMe and the journey behind the chart-topping song that gave hope to so many people.

programme.title: Solis
programme.desc: A thrilling sci-fi, driven by survival. After a space mining operation goes bad, Troy is on an emergency escape vehicle drifting towards the sun. Can someone save him in time?

programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: This biopic about race and identity won the Best Picture Oscar. An Italian-American bouncer becomes a driver for an African-American classical pianist touring the 1960s South.

programme.title: Max Winslow And The House Of Secrets
programme.desc: A thrilling sci-fi from the four-time Emmy winner Sean Olson. It's man versus machine when five teenagers compete to win a billionaire's smart mansion.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Sandy Bigelow Patterson has one week to hunt down the woman who has stolen his identity before his world implodes. Another superb comedy from Seth Gordon (Horrible Bosses).

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: This delightful film starring Robert De Niro and Anne Hathaway shows that you're never too old to learn new tricks. A man, tired of retirement, becomes an intern for a fashion site.

programme.title: Life On The Line
programme.desc: A high voltage drama starring John Travolta. A group of men have the deadly job of repairing the electrical grid, but a storm makes it even more deadly.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: A wedding gets turned on its head in this outrageously funny comedy. A rivalry between a maid of honour and a bridesmaid for the bride's affection leads to all sorts of chaos.

programme.desc: A wedding gets turned on its head in this outrageously funny comedy. A rivalry between a maid of honour and a bridesmaid for the bride's affection leads to all sorts of chaos.

programme.title: 10,000 BC

programme.title: The Watchdog
programme.desc: For incisive, probing, public-service journalism stay tuned to The Watchdog where public officials, leaders of corporate South Africa and other entities are put on the platform to account to the public they serve or cater to.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Morning Live focuses on what South Africans are waking up to on the day. The show carries the Diary for the day, Market Sense, General News, Crime and Courts issues, Political issues, Sports News, Live weather and traffic reports.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: Agenda breaks down the stories of the day, as set in Morning Live, in more detail and giving stories more substance as the story develops. These stories take news agenda forward.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E79 - Truth'. A friend of Marinette's gets akumatized into Truth. Using his power to force people to tell the truth, he wants to know Marinette's secret...and Ladybug and Cat Noir's, too!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E80 - Lies'. A friend of Adrien's get akumatized into Lies. Able to make liars disappear, she is determined to rid the world of lies and those who tell them...including superheroes!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E81 - Gang of Secrets'. Marinette's friends get akumatized into the Gang of Secrets, a team of supervillains determined to save her...whether she wants it or not!

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E44 - I Will Always Loathe You'. Miley's in the running for an award so Grandma comes to stay. Aunt Dolly comes too and the two women don't get on. Rico has a great idea for a public access commercial.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E39 - Level Up, Wild Side'. Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Chip Switch'. The Lab Rats defy Davenport's warnings and swap bionic chips. As a result, they wreck the elevator, trapping Principal Perry with Leo. It makes them realise they must work together.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Mission: Space'. Chase finds he has a secret ability - telekinesis, or moving things with his mind. Marcus spies on the Lab Rats, then hands a video to a mysterious man. What can it contain?

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S2/E36 - Vampire Luau'. Unaware that Davorin is free, Bella celebrates being accepted to fashion school and the gang arrange a party.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - Race to Stink Island'. Ludo remembers he was filming on his phone the night he was shattered. Everyone races to the island to find the phone and the evidence on it. But betrayal and heartbreak also await.

programme.title: No Good Deed
programme.desc: A noir thriller about an auto theft police detective who tries to help a friend find his missing daughter.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: A spectacular adventure that pits Godzilla against malevolent creatures that threaten the very existence of humans.

programme.title: Snakes On A Plane
programme.desc: When hundreds of venomous snakes invade an ill-fated trans-Pacific flight, Neville Flynn thwarts the twisted scheme of a deadly assassin.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino (Pulp Fiction) directs this spaghetti western. With the aid of a German bounty hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal plantation owner.

programme.title: The Last Boy Scout
programme.desc: The action is unstoppable and the bullets and insults fly as odd-couple Bruce Willis and Damon Wayans try to solve a murder case with political ties.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: The Wolfpack is back for another chaotic adventure in this insanely funny franchise. This time, they have to deal with more of Alan's antics, kidnapping and the infamous Mr Chow.

programme.title: 10 Minutes Gone
programme.desc: Bruce Willis stars in this crime mystery about a heist gone awry. As he was out cold, a man sets to find out what happened in the ten minutes that led to his brother's death.

programme.title: Never Back Down: No Surrender
programme.desc: Michael Jai White fights for his life in this MMA-filled action film. A former mixed martial arts champ is on the comeback trail to regain his title.

programme.title: Final Destination
programme.desc: Death is everywhere in this riveting horror. A teenager's vision prevents him and his friends from dying in a plane crash. But the Grim Reaper begins to hunt them down one by one.

programme.title: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: When Lucy and her two sons, Michael and Sam, move to Santa Clara, they discover, to their peril, that the area is a haven for a gang of vampires.

programme.title: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: When Lucy and her two sons, Michael and Sam, move to Santa Clara, they discover, to their peril, that the area is a haven for a gang of vampires.

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage drives this action thriller. A hunter catches a white jaguar, but all hell breaks loose when he ships it on the same ship as an arrested assassin.

programme.title: Days of the Bagnold Summer
programme.desc: A teenager spends his summer listening to heavy metal music and trying to get along with his librarian mom.

programme.title: What Women Want
programme.desc: Nick Marshall was the ultimate man's man until one night, in the privacy of his Rat Pack dream apartment, his eyes and ears opened more than he could have imagined or ever dreamed of.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg and Denzel Washington find themselves in way over their heads in this action-packed shoot 'em up. They must find a way to work together in order to survive.

programme.title: Triumph
programme.desc: Inspired by a real story, a determined high school senior strives to be a wrestler one last time despite having cerebral palsy.

programme.title: No Good Deed
programme.desc: A noir thriller about an auto theft police detective who tries to help a friend find his missing daughter.

programme.title: John Q
programme.desc: Denzel Washington gives a thrilling performance in a hostage drama with a moral twist. A father goes to extreme measures to save his son after a hospital declines to treat him.

programme.title: Fist Of Fury
programme.desc: A young man seeks vengence for the death of his teacher.

programme.title: Under Siege
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL, now a cook, is the only person who can stop a gang of terrorists when they seize control of a US Navy battleship.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: After his release from jail, an ex-con immediately seeks to settle old scores. But in the process, he comes to learn the true cost of vengeance.

programme.title: 12 Rounds 3: Lockdown
programme.desc: When detective John Shaw uncovers evidence linking his fellow officers to a murder, they frame him for a homicide he didn't commit.

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: A young man (Bruce Lee) sworn to an oath of non-violence breaks it after his master is murdered and he discovers the factory he works in is a front for drug-smuggling.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers
programme.desc: A brother and sister driving home through isolated countryside for spring break encounter a flesh-eating creature.

programme.title: Haunted Towns
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Savannah'. The team investigates hauntings that surround Savannah's 'Hanging Square.' This square has been the epicentre of Savannah's paranormal activity for over 300 years.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Higginsport School'. An unknown spirit lurks in the empty hallways of Ohio's Higginsport School. Is it evidence of a darker haunting caused by recent deaths on the property?

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - White Hill Mansion'. Nick and Katrina are at New Jersey's White Hill Mansion. While gathering evidence of a child in the attic, the mansion's history as a mob hangout raises concerns.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - Secret Aliens'. Geologists discover alien deposits on the Earth's surface - and the answer could shed light on the cause of the greatest extinction in its history.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Civil War'. Throughout the American civil war, victory on the battlefield was often decided not by strategy and bravery alone, but also by secret information coming from the shadows.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Alaskan Bigfoot'. A cryptozoologist hunts for scientific proof of Bigfoot in the remote Alaskan wilderness. Experts investigate a mysterious vortex of energy linked to disappearances.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Atlantis Of The Andes'. Josh Gates dives into a mystery below South America's Lake Titicaca. Josh discovers ruins from the ancient Tiwanaku people hidden in the lake's depths.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S23/E1 - Ball Of Mystery And More'. Don investigates an ominous orb with unusual powers, an interstellar sound from the dark side of the moon and the true identity of a world-renowned writer.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S23/E2 - Ancient Alien And More'. Don examines an ancient carving linked to alien activity, a scalpel used by America's first serial killer and an item buried beneath the World Trade Centre.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Mastodon Murder And Cleopatra'. Don Wildman recounts a tale of money, mastodons and murder. He also reveals how a priceless ancient Egyptian artifact was almost lost at sea.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Breaking All The Rules'. Jack introduces his parents to the spooky mystery of the Aswang. Plus, Ozzy is baffled by a video of suspected poltergeist activity.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - School Spirit'. A dark entity has reportedly taken refuge in an abandoned schoolhouse. The owners call on Amy, Adam and Chip to expel this scary entity.

programme.desc: 'S2/E9'. 'n Kortformaat dokumentêre reeks wat weekliks oor plaaslike landboukwessies gesels. Planne en raad word gedeel deur ons span kenners.

programme.title: Privaatspeurders
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Toe 'n man van Pretoria vermis geraak het, het privaatspeurder Odette van Staden ondersoek ingestel en hom vinnig opgespoor.

programme.title: Nisboere
programme.desc: 'S7/E6'. Ons reis die land vol om innoverende landbou-entrepreneurs te ontmoet wat woeker op 'n klein stukkie grond.

programme.title: Houvrou of Trouvrou?
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. Dis die laaste dag van die trouvrou-stryd en net een uitdaging lê voor vir die top-drie deelnemers: Hulle moet wys dat hulle goeie gasvroue is. Wie sal wegstap met die kontantprys van 'n halfmiljoen rand?

programme.title: Uit Die Slaapkamer
programme.desc: 'S2/E9'. Dr. Elna gesels oor orale probiotika en die gebruik daarvan. 'n Ma se dogter se vriendin het haar genader vir die voorbehoedpil - die span gesels oor dié penarie. 'n Paartjie het vrae oor seksuele rolspel.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Suid-Afrikaanse beeldhouer Adriaan Diedericks en leer hoe hy in die Franse platteland 'n ou vervalle skuur omskep in 'n ateljee.

programme.title: Die VIA-Kersmark
programme.desc: VIA-Kersmark gee lekker idees vir geskenke dié kerstyd. Ons wys en spog met plaaslike entrepreneurs se produkte en só kry álmal geskenke onder die kersboom hierdie jaar.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Suid-Afrikaanse beeldhouer Adriaan Diedericks en leer hoe hy in die Franse platteland 'n ou vervalle skuur omskep in 'n ateljee.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E9'. 'n Kortformaat dokumentêre reeks wat weekliks oor plaaslike landboukwessies gesels. Planne en raad word gedeel deur ons span kenners.

programme.title: Privaatspeurders
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Toe 'n man van Pretoria vermis geraak het, het privaatspeurder Odette van Staden ondersoek ingestel en hom vinnig opgespoor.

programme.title: Nisboere
programme.desc: 'S7/E6'. Ons reis die land vol om innoverende landbou-entrepreneurs te ontmoet wat woeker op 'n klein stukkie grond.

programme.title: Houvrou of Trouvrou?
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. Dis die laaste dag van die trouvrou-stryd en net een uitdaging lê voor vir die top-drie deelnemers: Hulle moet wys dat hulle goeie gasvroue is. Wie sal wegstap met die kontantprys van 'n halfmiljoen rand?

programme.title: Die Staat Teen
programme.desc: 'S2/E9'. Die staat teen Jason Rohde: Adv. Louis van Niekerk bespreek die opspraakwekkende saak wat gevolg het ná die moord op Susan Rohde.

programme.title: Kelderklas
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Jack Parow neem JP na Van Ryn's-brandewyn waar hulle alles, van 5 tot 25 jaar oue brandewyn, proe. Hulle ontdek ook 'n paar skemerkelkies.

programme.title: Huisgenoot Blokraaibestes
programme.desc: 'S3/E3'. Ons is op soek na die land se blokraai-boffin. Drie deelnemers se woordeskat en taalkennis word op die proef gestel om te kyk wie uiteindelik blokraai-koning kraai. Cintaine Schutte is die aanbieder.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Dinge raak kleurvol in Kemptonpark. Aaanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels help vir Jannie en Annemarie du Randt om hul TV-kamer 'n bietjie kleur te gee.

programme.title: Dr. Nou
programme.desc: 'S4/E3'. Tammy is 'n lewenslustig met 'n lewe vól uitdagings en wonderwerke. As kind is sy gediagnoseer met neonatale allo-immuun trombositopenie en wil vandag ander inspireer om die beste en mooiste weergawe van hulself te wees.

programme.title: Martelize Se Stamtafel
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - 1/9'. In dié kook-en-geselsprogram kuier die radio-omroeper, Martelize Brink, met bekendes in haar kombuis en kook disse uit hul plek van herkoms. Haar gaste leer ook meer oor hul eie stambome.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E7'. James Faber, voorsitter van die RPO, boer saam met sy broer Gert en dié se seun, Jaco, met besproeiingsgewasse en vee naby Barkly-Wes in die Noord-Kaap. Bek-en-klouseer is een van die kopsorge wat ons bespreek.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Lynette Francis-Puren ontmoet vir Danie Bester - 'n boer wat dinge reg doen! Hy is daarop ingestel om alle tegnologie, saad- en gewasbeskerming rég te gebruik vir die behoud van die tegnologie sowel as die natuur.

programme.title: Privaatspeurders
programme.desc: 'S1/E13'. Privaatspeurder Luke Enslin staan sy kliënte by om 'n saak van statutêre verkragting te open ná hul dogter op dertien swanger raak.

programme.title: Agter Tralies
programme.desc: 'S4/E13'. In 'n oogwink kan alles verander, wat wel die geval was toe Johan binne 'n kwessie van 'n splitsekonde rooi gesien en beheer verloor het. Dié tragiese insident het baie lewens verwoes.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Petré en Carina Prins en leer hoe hierdie hardwerkende Suid-Afrikaners 'n vervalle ou Franse huisie omskep in 'n oase van rustigheid.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Lynette Francis-Puren ontmoet vir Danie Bester - 'n boer wat dinge reg doen! Hy is daarop ingestel om alle tegnologie, saad- en gewasbeskerming rég te gebruik vir die behoud van die tegnologie sowel as die natuur.

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai: Familie En Vriende
programme.desc: 'S3/E8'. Ons gunstelingtydverdryf is nou 'n sosiale eksperiment. Drie paartjies wat mekaar nie ken nie, braai by mekaar en heelwat gebeur om die vuur. En ons praat nie net van die lekker kos nie!

programme.title: Wys My 'n Huis
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. In hierdie episode is getroude paartjie Charita en Rize op soek na 'n beleggingseiendom in die hartjie van Johannesburg. Hul beste vriend Kabelo kom lewer 'n opinie as buitestaander.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Die aanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels raak kreatief in Krugersdorp. Hulle help vir Zandré de Witt om 'n kombuis in 'n historiese huis nuwe lewe te gee.

programme.title: Dr. Nou
programme.desc: 'S4/E4'. Dokter Jurgens Grové en dokter Riekie Smit werk saam om pasiënte se selfbeeld 'n hupstoot te gee deur middel van kosmetiese prosedures en tandheelkunde.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. Ons loer in by Daleen van Zyl van Dalvan Simbras naby Potchefstroom, wat tegnologie inspan om die beweging van haar kudde te bestuur. Data-tegnologie sorg vir gesonder, veiliger diere en 'n meer winsgewende boerdery.

programme.title: Vergewe My
programme.desc: 'S4/E1'. Oortreders wat op soek is na vergifnis besoek hulle slagoffers en dié se naastes. Sal hierdie ontmoeting tot versoening lei of nie?

programme.title: Agter Tralies
programme.desc: 'S5/E1'. Oortreders vertel ons van die misdade wat hulle in die tronk laat beland, die tyd wat hulle agter tralies spandeer het, en hoe hulle ná hul vrylating hulle lewens in die buitewêreld herbou het.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Elbé en Christo Lindeque en leer hoe hierdie eklektiese Suid-Afrikaners 'n pragtige kasteel in die Franse platteland restoureer.

programme.title: Minki
programme.desc: 'S13/E8'. Lyntjie Jaars kuier in Minki se sitkamer. Sy's 'n Namakwalander in murg en been, en vertel van haar grootwordjare in die Noord-Kaap. Sy het sedertdien haar merk in die vermaaklikheidbedryf gemaak. 'n Rolmodel verras haar.

programme.title: Uit Die Slaapkamer
programme.desc: 'S2/E8'. Dr. Elna beantwoord 'n kyker se vraag oor libido en of dit mettertyd verander. 'n Ontstelde ouer het haar dogter betrap tydens seks en soek nou hulp. Die span gesels ook oor liefdestale.

programme.title: First Home Fix
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - 100-Year-Old Fixer'. Raisa and Austin renovate a 100-year-old home and reconfiguring it to meet the needs of its first-time homeowners will stretch their design limits.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: 'S26/E10 - Runner In Blaine, Washington'. Two runners became friends when they ran a relay race together. Years later, they return to where it all began to find a beachfront vacation home.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - From Greece to the Gold Coast'. Alison turns a friend's stunning high-rise condo into a unique take on city living. Plus, she jets off to create her own wine in Athens, Greece.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: 'S6/E6 - From Teardown to Italian Treasure'. After buying a home sight unseen, Mina and Karen tear it down. They work to figure out how to make the new build feel like a charming Italian villa.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Can This House Be Saved?'. After inheriting her family home, a young woman is ready to renovate it. Ben and Erin have a $120,000 budget, but the house may need too much work.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: 'S7/E7 - Shattered Flip'. Tarek and Christina get a lead on a four-bedroom home in Lakewood. Their hopes of a great deal are shattered when they discover that the house has been vandalised.

programme.title: Pool Kings
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 - All About the View'. The crew faces complications while converting a neglected '80s-style pool into a modern lakeside paradise featuring multiple entertainment areas.

programme.title: Pool Kings
programme.desc: 'S6/E9 - Ponds Have More Fun'. A Texas family asks the team to build a natural-looking cocktail pool. The guys also build an expansive creek waterfall and natural rock steps.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Family Fixer'. Lyndsay and Leslie take on their cousin's unfinished projects to get his home sold.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: 'S13/E1'. For Yolande and Toni, winning $2 million couldn't have come at a better time! They hunt for a home with lots of space for her mum and their two youngest kids.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: 'S13/E13'. David Bromstad helps lucky Americans buy their dream properties. The families, couples and individuals have won big in the lottery or on scratch cards.

programme.title: Home Inspector Joe
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - This Mold House'. Joe Mazza and Noel Gatts help a family find a house with no costly surprises and take their dream space from hazardous to fabulous.

programme.title: Home Inspector Joe
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Home inspector Joe Mazza won't let anyone move into a risky property. Along with designer Noel Gatts, he helps families find and renovate their dream home.
